title: The Oni Sellsword
description:
A princess has gone missing but who should answer the call? Why, Xavienne- the snarky oni from another world- of course! Who did you expect? She'll gather two of her "buddies" and journey to hell and back to save her best friend. A short RPG with a simple twist and tactical combat with a plot driven by unique characters.Features• A brisk story rife with charm.

• Three playable characters each with starkly different personalities and abilities.

• Tactical party-based, turn-based combat that requires figuring out how to dismantle your enemies' forces, yet simple enough for all gamers!

• Two character-based story decisions, leading to two different endings.
description_short: A totally free, short-but-sweet RPG with an unlikely hero. Journey across worlds as Xavienne to save her best friend, the beautiful Princess La.
